subcodes.first_line: The tongue and heart, the limbs and members, the inward and the outward, the first and the last, the veins and the hairs, all bear witness unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان و قلب و اعضا و اجزا باطن و ظاهر اول و آخر عروق و شعرات شهادت میدهند بر
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @rejection of Muhammad, @suffering and imprisonment
